violations.text: Employee was observed picking up item from floor with gloves on and then proceeded to touch food handling utensil. Employee washed hands and soiled utensil was replaced. When to wash hands reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
Handwashing notification signage lacking at handsinks in kitchen and near drive thru. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

Macaroni and cheese was observed at 132 degrees Fahrenheit for hot holding. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food that is cooked, cooled, and reheated for hot holding must be reheated to 165 degrees Fahrenheit or above for 15 seconds. Foods reheated during time of inspection to 177 degrees Fahrenheit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. fanguards in walk-in cooler and walk-in freezer 2. various equipment 3. greasetrap New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

The following in the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris: 1. kitchen hood vents 2. various walls in kitchen 3. dish area 4. mop area 5. floors under defroster units 6. floors in freezer The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the dry storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2024

3 Door Prep Unit observed at 71 degrees Fahrenheit. Per staff, part for repair is in transit. Facility has adequate refrigeration to meet requirements for opening. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the warewashing area is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

-Two windows observed in poor repair with boarded wood (per contractor, window replacements are scheduled to arrive for 11/21/24) -Several light bulbs under kitchen hood observed in poor repair Physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024
